mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fulfillment_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, user_id, saga_id, priority, fulfillment_type, assigned_picker_id, assigned_packer_id, pick_started_at, pick_completed_at, pack_started_at, pack_completed_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at, cancellation_reason, total_items, total_weight_grams, shipping_method, carrier, tracking_number, estimated_ship_date, estimated_delivery_date, notes, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT fo.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), fo.order_id, fo.warehouse_id, COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), fo.user_id, fo.saga_id, fo.priority, fo.fulfillment_type, fo.assigned_picker_id, fo.assigned_packer_id, fo.pick_started_at, fo.pick_completed_at, fo.pack_started_at, fo.pack_completed_at, fo.shipped_at, fo.delivered_at, fo.cancelled_at, fo.cancellation_reason, COALESCE(fo.total_items, 0), COALESCE(fo.total_weight_grams, 0), fo.shipping_method, fo.carrier, fo.tracking_number, fo.estimated_ship_date, fo.estimated_delivery_date, fo.notes, fo.state_id, fo.flow_id, fo.created_time, fo.last_modified_time FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON fo.warehouse_id = w.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.fulfillment_line_items_flat ( line_item_id, tenant, last_synced_at, fulfillment_order_id, order_item_id, product_id, variant_id, sku, quantity_ordered, quantity_allocated, quantity_picked, quantity_packed, quantity_shipped, quantity_short, bin_location, item_status, product_name, brand, weight_grams, unit_price, total_price ) SELECT fli.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), fli.fulfillment_order_id, fli.order_item_id, fli.product_id, fli.variant_id, fli.sku, COALESCE(fli.quantity_ordered, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_allocated, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_picked, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_packed, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_shipped, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_short, 0), fli.bin_location, fli.status, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(p.weight_grams, 0), COALESCE(oi.unit_price, 0), COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0) FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_line_items fli JOIN hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo ON fli.fulfillment_order_id = fo.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON fli.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_items oi ON fli.order_item_id = oi.id
